case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING LLC VS. SUSANNAH DENEGREE et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF NON SERVICE RE: SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT DENEGREE, SUSANNAH
